en: And this wormhole connects Hawkins to here.
Another world that I've coined the Abyss.
Any particular reason? A realm of pure chaos and evil. I'm sorry?

ko: 순수한 혼돈과 악의 영역이야. 뭐라고? D&D. 예수님. 와.

en: I believe this Abyss is the true home of the Demogorgons, the Vines, the Mind Flayer,
ko: 나는 이 심연이 데모고르곤의 진정한 고향이라고 믿어.

en: all the nasty shit we found in the Upside Down.
ko: 덩굴, 마인드 플레이어, 우리가 업사이드 다운에서 발견한 모든 끔찍한 것들.

en: And it's where all those years ago you banished Henry.
ko: 그리고 그곳에서 몇 년 전 네가 헨리를 추방했어.

en: He was lost for years, and he would have stayed lost if it wasn't for Brenner.
ko: 그는 몇 년 동안 잃어버렸고, 브레너 덕분에 찾을 수 있었어. 그가 헨리를 찾게 했어.

en: He had me find Henry. And when you made remote contact with the Abyss, the bridge formed.
ko: 네가 심연과 원거리 접촉을 했을 때, 다리가 형성됐어.

en: And ever since, Henry and his army of monsters have been using it to cross right back into Hawkins.
ko: 그 이후로 헨리와 그의 괴물 군대가

en: We kicked Vecna's ass last year, but I think he just fled across this bridge back to the Abyss to lick his wounds.
What a pussy. So all this time, Vecna's been hiding in the sky?
ko: 그러니까 그동안 벡나는 하늘에 숨어 있었던 거야?

en: Explains why every crawl led to a dead end. And why I can't find him in the bath.
ko: 그래서 모든 통로가 막다른 길로 이어졌구나.

en: My holly fell from the damn sky. Yeah, but why is he taking kids up there?
ko: 그래, 그런데 왜 아이들을 저기 데려가는 거지?

en: For the same reason he took me. The minds of children are weaker, right?
More easily molded and controlled. So he channeled his thoughts and powers through me to amplify his abilities,
ko: 맞아, 더 쉽게 형성되고 조종될 수 있어.
